title: Build the golden dataset
description: Assemble a representative, leak-free, segmented dataset with trusted reference answers and freeze it under version control.
body: Steps: 1. Define the task and the segments that matter (easy, hard, adversarial, edge). 2. Collect inputs disjoint from training/prompt material and check for cross-boundary duplicates. 3. Establish trusted reference answers or labels with a review process. 4. Segment and version the set, then freeze it. 5. Record the dataset version for every future score. Rollback point: before relabeling or adding cases. Validation: a leakage check passes and per-segment counts cover the failure cases, not just the happy path.
